nasb.text: In the latter period of their rule, When the transgressors have run their course, A king will arise, Insolent and skilled in intrigue.

esv.text: And at the latter end of their kingdom, when the transgressors have reached their limit, a king of bold face, one who understands riddles, shall arise.

cnv.text: “在這四國的後期， 犯罪的人惡貫滿盈的時候， 必有一個面貌兇惡的王興起， 他詭計多端。

ccb.text: 在四国的末期，人们恶贯满盈的时候，必有一个面貌凶恶、诡计多端的王兴起。
